intro: Farm game, Animals, preschool game, children's draw & paint, farm games, educational learning game.
description:
Dive into the colorful world of the farm and enjoy a relaxing coloring adventure for kids!
In this creative coloring book, children can discover many lovely farm animal pictures and bring them to life with their own colors. Whether it’s a cute sheep, a friendly cow, a happy pig, or other farm animals, every picture invites kids to be creative and have fun.

The game offers two easy and intuitive coloring modes. In pen mode, children can freely draw and color with countless colors, while the paint bucket mode allows them to fill areas quickly and easily. The pen size can be adjusted freely, making it possible to draw both small details and larger colorful areas.

For even more creative freedom, the line art of each picture can be hidden. This turns the canvas into a clean white drawing space where children can create their very own farm-themed artwork from scratch. They can color inside the lines, experiment with bright colors, or simply draw whatever they imagine.

Thanks to the touch-screen controls of the Nintendo Switch™, coloring feels simple, natural, and fun. The game is perfect for preschoolers and young children who enjoy animals, drawing, and creative play. It helps develop fine motor skills, color recognition, and imagination in a calm and entertaining way.

Get ready to visit the farm, choose your favorite animal picture, and fill the world with color! A relaxing and creative coloring book for children and the whole family to enjoy.
